comment: Pinned religious-content sources. NO-AI ZONE: bytes flow from these URLs into data/ and are verified against content.lock. Never edit data files or the lock by hand (CLAUDE.md rule 1).

artifacts.license: Creative Commons Attribution 3.0 — Tanzil terms: text must remain verbatim, attribution to tanzil.net required, copyright block in file must be retained
artifacts.attribution: Quran text (Uthmani) from Tanzil (tanzil.net), Uthmani script based on the Medina Mushaf

artifacts.license: Public domain (first published 1930); file distributed via Tanzil translations collection
artifacts.attribution: DEV English translation: Mohammed Marmaduke Pickthall, The Meaning of the Glorious Koran (1930), via tanzil.net — final shipping translation pending human review (Human Gate #5)
